title: sida integrifolia
intro: Sida integrifolia, also known as the hairy sida or button sida, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sida integrifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Sida integrifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
